core_message: Introduce the project as a PHM AI system built on NASA C-MAPSS
Point RUL prediction alone is not enough for usable maintenance decisions
C-MAPSS defines the degradation-prediction benchmark and operational context
The app is a contract-based Predictive -> Agent -> Dashboard system
Raw C-MAPSS rows are transformed into a selected and standardized predictive feature set
RF was deployed because it balanced quality

slide_title: Agent Layer and Deterministic Decision Logic
core_message: Deterministic risk logic turns RUL into auditable recommendations with optional non-central LLM help

column5: and useful for comparative sensitivity analysis

core_message: Deployment choices were shaped by cost
The current system is strong but constrained by tabular serving and limited local sensitivity
The project demonstrates a deployable and traceable PHM system rather than just a benchmark model
Keep reproducibility and audit details ready for reviewer questions
